title: a FEW but so many questions
display_title: a FEW but so many questions
wikitext:
[]: a FEW (but so many) questions..             Quote Post by ST.Clare » Sun Feb 13, 2011 1:04 am hi there! i get abled to watched the whole EVA anime episodes, the 2 anime movies, and the new version of Evangelion, but apparently i would to ask because even i merely understand the whole series, it still makes me confused, so if im wrong, kindly please clear it out for me ok thx!! in the anime series, what i understand is: well gendo is plotting to betray seele in order to fulfill his own instrumentally, but in order to do that, he must beat all of the angels because all of his stuff are in there, and he succeed until the end of the series. in Death and rebirth: at 1st, i really didn't understand the whole movie until i get abled to watch EoE and i realized that it's shiji ikari's nirvana (or instrumentally) taking place. in EoE: in this one, well i get able to have some answers here. but the more answers i get the more questions i also get, here are some of this: 1)i realized that angels had something to do in the second impact but, the angel who did it is an Evangelion-shaped light angel so: (Eva-shaped light in 2nd and an Eva in 3rd?? so does it mean that in the 1st impact, also an Evangelion takes place in it?) (if not? how does that Eva-shaped light just like an Eva? does it mean that only an Evangelion can fulfill the instrumentally? and others are destined to fail?) 2)UN and JSSDF join force to destroy nerv and to start the instrumentally: (UN?? huh? does the other countries is not aware of whats happening and are they not aware of what will happen if gendo (or seele) succeed starting the intrumentally?) (hmm as far as i know, some of the members of UN is also members of seele, so seele can control UN?) 3)and last, is the main purpose of instrumentally project is initiate a some kind of "nirvana" to all living things so they can have a happy ending. (well gendo ikari wants to initiate his own instrumentally so he can get to her wife again right? [w/c is yui]) (while on the other hand, seele wants to start the instrumentally because they want to follow whats within the Dead Sea Scrolls w/c is to destroy anything[the same as the Revelation in the Holy Bible]) and after all of the stuff happened, gendo and seele failed to initiate their instrumentally,and Shinji ikari gets the reward unconsciously. well, Shinji had his own instrumentally plot? well he didnt really planned to do it apparently i think it happened because he really want to protect the people he loved: (so he get his reward by making Asuka ,Rei and Kaworu alive) (and also, he gets abled to destroy humanity by recreating it[just like the book of genesis in the bible]) 2 pairs of Adam and Eve, it seems not bad at all. (please if some of my questions, answers and comments are wrong, please tell me kindly ok!)

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Feb 13, 2011 1:44 am Whew...! I'm tired. Too many questions. Too many unclear questions. Here, this will help you: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/[/url] More specifically: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/First_Impact[/url] [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Second_Impact[/url] [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Third_Impact[/url] [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Adam[/url] [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelions[/url] [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/JSSDF[/url] These should answer most of your questions. BTW: this "Eva-shaped light" you wrote about is "Adam", the first Angel. Evas are clones of Adam. So it's actually the Evas who are Adam-shaped. Not the other way around. On a side note: if you want people to answer your questions, put some effort into writing them properly. Seriously.

[]: Re: a FEW (but so many) questions..             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 13, 2011 3:49 am Q1 has already been covered Q2 -- all the conspiracies around Instrumentality are ultra hush-hush, not common knowledge. SEELE probably let slip to the Japanese government that Gendo was planning to do something like Second Impact and let them go in like they were taking out a hive of terrorist fanatics; the idea being that then they could do their version while everyone who might contest the operation would have been taken out or at least distracted. Q3 -- the main purpose of instrumentally project is something left quite vague. Each actor (SEELE, Gendo, Yui) seems to have a different take. This thread http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1393 shows how some of the different versions played out in the NGE2 game.

[]:             Quote Post by ST.Clare » Sun Feb 13, 2011 6:13 am huh?? so does it mean that the much clearer story is in the playstation game? ow how's disappointing... well i didnt have playstation in our house and all ive got is a PC, and i can also do is to rent a PC... well if im going to ask my bf who's also a fan of this anime series (remember assasinate ) i think i cant merely trust him because he's always busy in his games >.< well can u guys rather just give me some summary of the EVA2 game... just a link...if its ok to you guys??

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 13, 2011 6:56 am ST.Clare wrote: so does it mean that the much clearer story is in the playstation game?

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun Feb 13, 2011 9:48 am Maybe we should just make a sticky thread where all the newb's questions are answered so they don't clutter the forum. Thread Instrumentality so to speak.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Feb 13, 2011 2:33 pm Trajan wrote: Maybe we should just make a sticky thread where all the newb's questions are answered so they don't clutter the forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 13, 2011 3:26 pm Hey guys, we may many of us be jaded and cynical, but let's not let it all hang out in front of the newcomers, eh?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Feb 13, 2011 3:34 pm The TV series can be interpreted as a Gendo Good End scenario -- he's the one that explains what's going on; and at the end he's there with Yui, along with everyone else in some abstract world.
